2025-26 Men's Basketball Roster

Ron Lane

10 Shota Abashidze

  • Position Guard
  • Height 5-11
  • Weight 150
  • Class Junior
  • Hometown Tbilisi, Georgia
  • Highschool Elevation Prep Academy
  • Bio
  • Stats
  • Historical

Biography

Univ. of Arkansas at Little Rock
  • Prepped two seasons with the Trojans
High School
  • Prepped on the varsity basketball team at Elevation Prep Academy
  • Named 212 Basketball Team Captain
  • Named to the Georgian National Team Extended Roster U20
Personal
  • Majoring in Business
  • Has one sister 
  • Enjoys playing 2K and skiing
